RIO

Web Developer & Android Developer

Palembang, Indonesia | justrio24@gmail.com | github.com/JustRio24 | LinkedIn

Professional Summary

Informatics Management student with hands-on experience in full-stack web development and Android application development. Proficient in building responsive web applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS, as well as native Android apps with Java and Firebase. Passionate about creating innovative digital solutions that solve real-world problems. Experienced in IoT-based systems, ERP development, and progressive web applications (PWA).

Education

Politeknik Negeri Sriwijaya (POLSRI) 2023 — Present
D-III Manajemen Informatika (Informatics Management)
Palembang, South Sumatra, Indonesia

Technical Skills

Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Python, Java, HTML5, CSS3, SQL
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Vite
Backend: Laravel, Node.js, REST API
Mobile: Android (Java), Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
Database: MySQL, Firebase Realtime Database, Firestore
Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Arduino IDE, Figma
Other: IoT (Arduino), IT Support, Responsive Design, SEO

Projects

KONSTRA — Contractor Management System (PWA) React, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Radix UI

Built a progressive web application for streamlining contractor management, site operations, and project monitoring with offline-first capabilities for remote usage.

SPECTRA — Corporate Operations Platform Laravel, Blade, PHP

Developed an internal corporate platform for PT. SatSet MerahPutih Indonesia managing end-to-end workflows including field worker attendance, daily progress reporting, and multi-role dashboards.

Payroll System HRIS TypeScript, HRIS

Comprehensive payroll and attendance management system (HRIS) for PT Panca Karya Utama, handling employee data, salary calculations, and attendance tracking.

ERP Tempe 3 Puteri v2 Laravel, PHP, Blade

Custom ERP system for UMKM Tempe 3 Puteri integrating inventory management, production tracking, and financial reporting modules.

SmartDrum — IoT Dashboard Web-Based IoT, Arduino, Web

IoT-based monitoring system for automated mushroom cultivation, providing real-time tracking of temperature, humidity, and water levels with web dashboard visualization.

MiDClass App — Learning Management System Android, Java, Firebase

Mobile application helping students and lecturers manage academic activities including attendance tracking, academic calendar, and user profiles.

Visit Palembang — Tourism Web App JavaScript, HTML/CSS, React

Modern, responsive web application promoting the beauty, culture, and tourist attractions of Palembang with interactive UI and optimized performance.

Sweetmelt Cookies — E-commerce Website JavaScript, E-commerce

E-commerce website for showcasing and selling artisan cookies with product catalog, cart functionality, and responsive design.

Gobeng App React, Vite

Modern, responsive web application built with React and Vite featuring dynamic UI components and optimized performance.

SIMAMANG v2 — Internship Management System Laravel, PHP, Blade

Web application to digitalize student internship application processes at POLSRI, streamlining workflows for students, supervisors, and administrators.

UMKM Mie Mercon Jawara — E-commerce Laravel, Blade

Full-featured e-commerce application for local UMKM business with product management, order processing, and interactive shopping experience.
